name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-32
title: Wave 7 historical-burden sweep: delete phantom-defending tests + spec/hook tombstones
description:
Wave 7 deletion-biased sweep. Drop phantom-defending tests guarding long-removed renames, and trim 'legacy/previously/removed' tombstone prose from active spec invariants and hook docstrings.

DELETIONS (entire test files, all guard renames/removals with zero live producers):
- test/test-no-rbt-refs.py (5 tests, all assert .rbt- string absent)
- test/test-RABBIT-CAGE-23-rename-rbt-prefix.py (15+ absence assertions for .rbt-/RBT_ names)
- test/test-hook-enforcement.py t5+t6 only (Agent matcher + rbt-policy-check.sh both long-removed)
- test/test-claude-md-header.py t6 only (legacy one-liner phrase, generated from JSON registry)
- test/test-obsolete-removed.py (root-management, breeder/vet, etc — removed many cycles ago)
- test/test-RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-92-stale-invariants-removed.py
- test/test-RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-93-retired-refs.py
- test/test-RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-94-stale-refs.py
- test/test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-24-validate-all-removed.py

SPEC TRIMS (docs/spec/spec.md — drop legacy sentences, keep positive assertion):
- L40 Inv 10: drop trailing 'legacy single-paragraph header' sentence
- L48: drop 'legacy validate-all.py removed in BACKLOG-24' clause
- L219 Inv 41: trim R1-branch tombstone enumeration; keep 'MUST NOT auto-create/switch branches'
- L545: drop 'legacy / serial-dispatch form' wording on global marker (still active dual-format)
- L816: trim 'r1_branch wrapper is no longer called by any producer' (negative claim)

HOOK + COMMENT TRIMS:
- hooks/refresh.py:81-83 (BUG-80 inline policy section comment)
- hooks/session-init.py:9-13 (R1 enforcement removed paragraph)
- hooks/_runtime_flags.py:73 ('formerly-silent error-handler' phrase)
- hooks/sync-check.py:97 (BUG-92 parenthetical aside)
- README.md:71-72 (drop 'legacy validate-all.py was removed in BACKLOG-24' clause)
- test/test-POLICY-BACKLOG-1-session-init-branch.py:5 docstring
- test/test-RABBIT-CAGE-WAVE2-inv61-65.py:5 docstring

OUT-OF-SCOPE (preserve unchanged): BACKLOG-31 bypass-human-approval prose at spec.md:174,213,226,861-880 — recent rename (<2 cycles old, PR #171). spec.md:537 ANSI/[rabbit] prohibition stays (active LLM-pitfall constraint).

CATALYST: Phase 1 reviewer (general-purpose subagent) audited rabbit-cage under wave 7 rubric A-E. Reduction est: ~9 test files removed (~250 lines), ~20 spec lines trimmed, ~15 comment-line trims.
